scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams (projects, features, environments, segments) only; the full Unleash admin API surface (strategies, tags, addons, api-tokens, feature toggle mutation, playground, events, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: superseded by project-scoped /api/admin/projects/{projectId}/features, which legacy uses
/api/admin/projects/{projectId}/features is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/api/admin/api-tokens requires elevated/admin scopes outside this connector's declared credential contract
/api/admin/events is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/api/admin/addons is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
